title: aster altaicus
intro: Aster altaicus, also known as Korean aster or white flower aster, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to East Asia, belonging to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aster altaicus include relief from fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Aster altaicus typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or used topically for skin conditions.
